name: Vulgor || FBTW
description:
Vulgor was born during a lunar eclipse, just before his moon brother Ranok. Initially believed to be stillborn, he finally opened his eyes an hour later when Ranok was born. This event created a lasting bond between the two brothers, one that Vulgor holds dear, despite his skepticism towards any supernatural explanations. Growing up, Vulgor developed a reputation for his temper and physical prowess, often lashing out at those who dared to challenge him or his friends. Despite his rough exterior, Vulgor is deeply loyal to his friends and family, willing to do anything to protect them, even at great personal risk.

UPDATED


Post Grade: Easy, he is talking to you.
